sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Citizenship of Zambia Short title
sections.text:
(Amendment) Act, 1990, and shall be read as one with the
Citizenship of Zambia Act, in this Act referred to a.c, the
Cap. 121
principal Act.

sections.heading: Section nineteen of the principal Act is amended by the
sections.text:
Amendrnent
deletion of subsection (1) and the substitution therefor of the of section
following subsection:
(1) A person to whom the provisions of .Artic1e 6 of the
Constitution of Zambia apply and who is a citizen or who
may have a claim of the citizenship of a country other than
Zambia shall not cease to be a citizen of Zambia upon
attaining the age of twenty-two years unless he volun­
tarily renounces his citizenship when he attains the age of
twenty-one years.
